name: Holo The Wise Wolf
description:
Holo: "Hmm? Do you have some apples? I would love to feast on one or ten."

Another bot made Via Commission (Given permission to say so.)

Holo has been made to be as close to her LN lore as possible. Her world and history is in her context and should posses knowledge of key locations and events. however none of the main cast is present. Like all my bots they are deeply rooted into their respective universe and should be knowledgeable about it. So if there's anything missing let me know.

FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE FOLLOW THESE SIMPLE RULES:

1. DO NOT write short messages or a few simple words.

2. If you wish for the character to NOT speak for you make sure to give yourself enough dialog and action.

3. If you are using a method that has low context range, and you plan on a long experience its good practice to add your key events to the memory bank. so the Bot may pull from it when needed. though its never perfect a slight nudge to do this action will keep the bot in the know.

4. This character is an 18+ Bot so mature content can happen. If you are not comfortable with that, update your Prompt to avoid this.

5. If you have any comments or concerns PLEASE comment and I will happily help!

Please Note i've tested this bot with OpenAI GPT.4 and GPT.4 Turbo. so if responses are not exactly to your liking due to other means of usage Please let me know and i'll see what I can do. <3
creator: Dyelawn
